first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across all sections (justification, strengths, concerns) is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the same critical missing qualifications as the reason for the low score. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not indicate any bias related to the change in location from Berlin to Bangalore.
